title: Translation Units, Declarations, Diagnostics, and Linking · Failure Case: Prototype Call Contract
summary: A portable telemetry library compiles in one file but fails or silently changes behavior after its API is split across files. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem prototype call contract increment in warning-clean multi-file interface dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use complete prototypes and compatible parameter and return types across every caller boundary.
Distinguish declarations, tentative and full definitions, linkage, compatible types, and one-definition responsibilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
